name: Kevin Hart
bio: Kevin Hart is an American comedian and actor known for high-energy, self-deprecating stand-up drawn from his family life, insecurities, and short stature, built into arena-filling tours and concert films. After breaking through on Judd Apatows Undeclared, he became one of the worlds top-grossing comedians with tours and films including Laugh at My Pain, Let Me Explain, and What Now?, alongside the Ride Along and Jumanji franchises. He received the Mark Twain Prize for American Humor in 2024.

timeline.ev: Cast in Judd Apatows series Undeclared
Releases album/film Im a Grown Little Man
Laugh at My Pain becomes a top-grossing comedy tour
Launches Laugh Out Loud media company
Receives the Mark Twain Prize for American Humor

accolades: Mark Twain Prize for American Humor (2024)
Two Grammy Award nominations and four Primetime Emmy nominations

films.note: Opposite Ice Cube; spawned a franchise.
